footer.brandDescription: Small-batch artisan perfumes handcrafted in Portugal. Each fragrance is personally blended by Kim using the finest European ingredients — never mass-produced, never rushed.

home.heroSubtitle: Each fragrance is personally blended by Kim using the finest European ingredients — never mass-produced, never rushed.
home.artisanQualityDesc: Handcrafted in small batches using premium European ingredients
home.freeSamplesDesc: Every order includes 2 complimentary samples of your choice
home.collectionSubtitle: Discover unique scents, each one a personal expression of artistry and passion
home.discoveryTitle: Not Sure Which Scent Is Yours?
home.discoveryDesc: Try three of our signature fragrances for just €15 — and we'll include a €10 credit toward your first full bottle. The perfect way to discover your new signature scent.
home.discoveryDetails: 3 × 2ml spray vials · Free shipping · €10 credit included
home.kimStory1: Every KAS fragrance is personally crafted by Kim in her studio in Portugal. With a passion for unique scent combinations and an uncompromising commitment to quality, Kim sources only the finest European ingredients to create fragrances that tell a story.
home.kimQuote: "I believe fragrance is deeply personal. Each bottle I create carries a piece of my heart — I want you to feel that when you wear it."
